heroHeadline: El Mayo Sentencing 10 Days Away — 618 Days Since Capture, 571 Days of Cartel Civil War
heroSubtitle: 618 days since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,408+ homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. El Mayo faces mandatory life imprisonment and a $15 billion forfeiture at his April 13 sentencing before Judge Brian Cogan (EDNY); the US government's response to his defense memo is due April 6. La Mayiza controls approximately 90% of former Chapitos territory. Chapitos gunmen massacred 8 people at a Culiacán drug rehabilitation center in early April. Joint SEDENA/SEMAR/State Police Semana Santa operations continue across Sinaloa. Chapitos security chief 'El Chuta' remains at large following his February 2026 Chicago narcoterrorism indictment.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, CBC News
